purpose: Retest Hadoop under the fair-retrieval contract with the healthier explicit worker-RPC retry case, the weaker RM-channel reanchor, and the already reanchored cleanup/shuffle slots.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 21:49:53,325 INFO [main] org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Client: Retrying connect to server: minint-fnanli5.fareast.corp.microsoft.com/10.86.169.121:49594. Already tried 0 time(s); retry policy is RetryUpToMaximumCountWithFixedSleep(maxRetries=10, sleepTime=1000 MILLISECONDS)

Hadoop.alert_match: java.io.IOException: Failed on local exception: java.io.IOException: An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host; Host Details : local host is: "MININT-FNANLI5/127.0.0.1"; destination host is: "msra-sa-41":8030;
Hadoop.eligibility_note: RM-channel reanchor using the IO-stream exception instead of the direct retry line so alert-only should fall back to family-level control-link disruption.
